mapper.insert: insert into member_tbl values( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberAddr}, #{memberAddrDetail}, null, 0, sysdate )
mapper.select:
select count(*) from member_tbl
and member_grade = #{grade} - 1
and (member_id like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' or member_name like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')

select member_id, member_name, member_email, member_phone, member_addr, member_addr_detail, member_thumb, member_grade, enroll_date from member_tbl
and member_grade = #{grade} - 1
and (member_id like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' or member_name like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')
order by
member_name asc
member_name desc
enroll_date desc
enroll_date asc
enroll_date desc
offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
mapper.update: update member_tbl SET member_thumb = null where member_id = #{memberId}
